constants.description: Stores the envelope name for the patient assessment. The default value is Benefit Reverification.
constants.name: PatientAssessmentEnvelope

constants.description: Stores the text value of the event status when the assessment response is received from the patient. The default value is PatientAssessmentResponseReceived.
constants.name: PatientResponseReceivedEventStatus

constants.description: Stores the envelope name for the payor assessment. The default value is Payor Assessment.
constants.name: PayorAssessmentEnvelope

constants.description: Stores the text value of the event status when the assessment response is received from the payor. The default value is PayorAssessmentResponseReceived.
constants.name: PayorResponseReceivedEventStatus

customErrors.description: Sets the error message that the flow returns when there’s an error creating the CareBnftVrfyRqstStsChgEvent record.
customErrors.name: SetCreateCareBnftVrfyRqstStsChgEventErrorMessage
customErrors.label: Set Error Message

customErrors.description: Sets the error message that the flow returns when there’s an error updating the care benefit verify request record.
customErrors.name: SetErrorMessage
customErrors.label: Set Error Message

customErrors.description: Sets the error message that the flow returns when there’s an error creating the CareBnftVrfyRqstStsChgEvent record.
customErrors.name: SetErrorMessageCreateCareBnftVrfyRqstStsChgEvent
customErrors.label: Set Error Message

decisions.description: Determines whether a related care benefit verify request exists by checking if the Care Benefit Verify Request ID field of the record in the Care Benefit Verify Request from Get Related Care Benefit Verify Request record variable has a value.
decisions.name: Have_RelatedCareBenefitVerifyRequest
decisions.label: Have Related Care Benefit Verify Request?

decisions.description: Determines whether a related care benefit verify request exists by checking if the Care Benefit Verify Request ID field of the record in the Care Benefit Verify Request from Get Related Care Benefit Verify Request record variable has a value.
decisions.name: HaveRelatedCareBenefitVerifyRequest
decisions.label: Have Related Care Benefit Verify Request?

decisions.description: Determines whether the Name of the triggering record matches the value of the PatientAssessmentEnvelope or the PayorAssessmentEnvelope.
decisions.name: WhichEnvelopeName
decisions.label: Which Envelope Name?

Flow.interviewLabel: Update Verification Request Status to Pending Confirmation Clone {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Update Verification Request Status to Pending Confirmation Clone

recordCreates.description: Creates a care benefit verify request status changed event record, setting the Record Identifier to Care Benefit Verify Request ID, and status to PatientResponseReceivedEventStatus.
recordCreates.name: CreateCareBenefitVerifyRequestStatusChangedEventPatientResponse
recordCreates.label: Create Care Benefit Verify Request Status Changed Event

recordCreates.description: Creates a care benefit verify request status changed event record, setting the Record Identifier to Care Benefit Verify Request ID, and status to PayorResponseReceivedEventStatus.
recordCreates.name: CreateCareBenefitVerifyRequestStatusChangedEventPayorResponse
recordCreates.label: Create Care Benefit Verify Request Status Changed Event

recordLookups.description: Gets the care benefit verify request record with an ID that matches the Request Reference ID of the triggering record. Stores the ID and RelatedCareBnftVerifyRequestId of the result in the Care Benefit Verify Request from Get Related Care Benefit Verify Request record variable.
recordLookups.name: GetRelatedCareBnftVrfyRqst
recordLookups.label: Get Related Care Benefit Verify Request

recordUpdates.description: Updates the care benefit verify request record with an ID matching the Request Reference ID of the record that triggered the flow, setting the status to Received Confirmation.
recordUpdates.name: UpdateCareBenefitVerifyRequest
recordUpdates.label: Update Care Benefit Verify Request

textTemplates.description: Stores the text template that contains the message that's displayed to the flow user when there's an error creating the CareBnftVrfyRqstStsChgEvent record.
textTemplates.name: CreateCareBnftVrfyRqstStsChgEventErrorTextTemplate
textTemplates.text: Something went wrong and we couldn’t create the care benefit verify request status changed event record.

textTemplates.description: Stores the text template that contains the message that’s displayed to the flow user when there’s an error updating the care benefit verify request record.
textTemplates.name: UpdateCareBenefitVerifyRequestErrorTextTemplate
textTemplates.text: Something went wrong and we couldn’t update the care benefit verify request record.
